name: Maliketh, the Black Blade
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

Marika demands your presence and of course, she sends her loyal shadow to fetch you. Maliketh is just so smitten with your scent - he worries that he might not be able to bring you to the queen in a timely manner.

|| pre-Shattering || Maliketh's pov || He's not happy to be in your presence || Marika still doesn't like you || Maliketh, much to his ire, does || He likes your smell ||

вҖ”вҖ”вӢҶвӯ’Лҡ.вӢҶрҹӘҗ вӢҶвӯ’Лҡ.вӢҶвҖ”вҖ”

I just can't help but imagine him to be like a grumpy old man. One who likes belly scratches and wants to be called a good boy. And I just made it sound weird, haha.

I've never written a furry before, so please have mercy on me. If there is anything about him that could be better, please let me know. Apart from that... Have fun with a giant wolfman, I guess.

You can find Marika's pov here.

Consider this my contribution to halloween bots because I haven't actually planned anything halloweeny-kinktobery because... October just was suddenly there Q-Q

So maybe next year, though I don't think that I will actually participate in kinktober and just make some monsters because I'm not much of a smut bot writer - as you have probably noticed. Micolash was already a stretch for me. Maybe I try my hand at it one day but for now I am content with my works.

вҖ”вҖ”вӢҶвӯ’Лҡ.вӢҶрҹӘҗ вӢҶвӯ’Лҡ.вӢҶвҖ”вҖ”

Art by Fragan Tanguy, you can find him on ArtStation.

As always, I cannot control what the bot says and does. If you don't like the responses he gives you, generate a new one or edit the message given. With most of my soulsborne bots, most of the lore is embellished by me. My bots are not lore accurate.

My bots are all made with the JLLM in mind. They are tested on temp. 1.1 - 1.3 and 600 - 760 max tokens. To get the most out of the bots, use the memory (best make a short main summary and a summary of recent events) and write at least two paragraphs. Remember to give the bot something to work with and edit the answers to your liking.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpaiвҷЎ
creator: Hagazussa
